nasb.text: But it is easier for heaven and earth to pass away than for one stroke of a letter of the Law to fail.

esv.text: But it is easier for heaven and earth to pass away than for one dot of the Law to become void.

cnv.text: 天地過去，要比律法的一點一畫失效還容易呢。

ccb.text: 不过，就是天地都消失，律法的一点一划也不会失效。

csbs.text: 天地的消逝，也比律法的一笔一画落空更容易呢！
